query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime elevated view of an expansive asphalt parking lot with a small guard booth featuring a peaked roof positioned near the center-right. The booth is encircled by short yellow bollards, striped barrier gates, and a dark signboard. Several tall light poles cast concentrated illumination onto the surrounding pavement, revealing surface markings and textural variations. In the background, a raised roadway with concrete dividers and additional street lighting extends horizontally across the upper portion of the scene. No people or vehicles are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime elevated view of an expansive asphalt parking lot consumed by exposure extremes that bury most of the frame in cavernous black shadow, isolating small islands of artificial light. A small guard booth with a peaked roof sits near the center-right, encircled by short yellow bollards and striped barrier gates, caught under visibly inconsistent color temperatures that fracture the scene into patches of cold blue-white and warm sodium orange. The broken tonal coherence and oppressive vacant darkness evoke atmospheric distress, while a distant raised roadway with concrete dividers fades into the night under mismatched street lighting.
